attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
1 AS BATCH_ID,
CPSL.DEAL_ID AS DEAL_ID,
COALESCE(CPSL.OBJECT_ID, -999) AS OBJECT_ID,
CPSL.PARENT_LINE_OBJECT_ID AS PARENT_LINE_OBJECT_ID,
COALESCE(CPSL.SCENARIO_OBJECT_ID, -999) AS SCENARIO_OBJECT_ID,
COALESCE(CPSL.LINE_NUMBER, 'UNKNOWN') AS LINE_NUMBER,
CPSL.SOURCE_TYPE AS SOURCE_TYPE,
CPSL.LINE_TYPE AS LINE_TYPE,
CPSL.PART_NUMBER AS PART_NUMBER,
CPSL.PART_CATEGORY AS PART_CATEGORY,
CPSL.DESCRIPTION AS DESCRIPTION,
CPSL.QUANTITY AS QUANTITY,
CPSL.DURATION AS DURATION,
-999 AS REFERENCE_LIST_PRICE,
CASE 
WHEN CPSL.LINE_TYPE = 7
THEN 
   CASE
      WHEN (CPSL.QUANTITY * CPSL.DURATION) = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE 
          COALESCE( (COALESCE(CPSL.EXT_LIST_PRICE, 0) * 12) / (CPSL.QUANTITY * CPSL.DURATION), 0)
   END
ELSE
   COALESCE(CPSL.LIST_PRICE, 0)
END AS LIST_PRICE,
CPSL.EXT_LIST_PRICE AS EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE,
-999 AS DISCOUNT_RATE,
CPSL.NS_DISCOUNT_RATE AS NS_DISCOUNT_RATE,
-999 AS DISCOUNT_PERCENTAGE,
-999 AS NS_DISCOUNT_PERCENTAGE,
-999 AS DISCOUNT_AMOUNT,
-999 AS NS_DISCOUNT_AMOUNT,
-999 AS NET_PRICE,
CPSL.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE AS EXTENDED_NET_PRICE,
-999 AS STANDARD_COST,
-999 AS EXTENDED_STANDARD_COST,
-999 AS OVERHEAD,
-999 AS EXTENDED_OVERHEAD,
CPSL.ROYALTY AS ROYALTY,
-999 AS EXTENDED_ROYALTY,
'UNKNOWN' AS ROYALTY_EXPRESSION,
-999 AS SOURCE_LINE_ID,
-999 AS PARENT_SOURCE_LINE_ID,
'N' AS MINOR_CONFIGURABLE,
CPSL.PART_MAJOR_FAMILY_ID AS PART_MAJOR_FAMILY_ID,
CPSL.PART_MAJOR_FAMILY_NAME AS PART_MAJOR_FAMILY_NAME,
'UNKNOWN' AS SOURCE_OBJECT_ID,
CPSL.REFERENCE_LINE_OBJECT_ID AS REFERENCE_LINE_OBJECT_ID,
'VALID' AS STATUS,
'UNKNOWN' AS STATUS_MESSAGE,
1 AS ACTIVE,
COALESCE(CPSL.CREATED_BY, 'UNKNOWN') AS CREATED_BY,
COALESCE(CPSL.CREATED_ON, CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS CREATED_ON,
COALESCE(CPSL.UPDATED_BY, 'UNKNOWN') AS UPDATED_BY,
COALESCE(CPSL.UPDATED_ON, CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS UPDATED_ON,
CPSL.GPL_LIST_PRICE AS GPL_LIST_PRICE,
CPSL.UPLIFT_FACTOR AS UPLIFT_FACTOR,
-999 AS EXT_NET_PRICE_AMT_EXCLUDE_MYD,
-999 AS TRADE_IN_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT_STD,
-999 AS TRADE_IN_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT_NS,
CPSL.FINAL_DISC AS FINAL_DISC,
round(CPSL.FINAL_NET_PRICE,4) AS FINAL_NET_PRICE,
round(CPSL.ADDITIONAL_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT,4) AS ADDITIONAL_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT,
round(CPSL.NEGOTIATED_NET_PRICE_AMT,4) AS NEGOTIATED_NET_PRICE_AMT,
(CPSL.NEGOTIATED_DISCOUNT * 100) AS NEGOTIATED_DISCOUNT,
(CPSL.NEGOTIATED_NS_DISCOUNT * 100) AS NEGOTIATED_NS_DISCOUNT,
'BU' AS SW_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE,
CPSL.MLB_INDICATOR AS MLB_INDICATOR,
CPSL.CONTRACTUAL_DISC AS CONTRACTUAL_DISC,
CPSL.ERP_PRODUCT_FAMILY AS ERP_PRODUCT_FAMILY,
CPSL.TOTAL_COST AS TOTAL_COST,
-999 AS EXT_TOTAL_COST,
CPSL.FA_DISC_APPROVED AS FA_DISC_APPROVED,
CPSL.TEP_FLG AS TEP_FLG,
CPSL.TAA_FLG AS TAA_FLG,
CPSL.FULFILLMENT_TYPE AS FULFILLMENT_TYPE,
CPSL.EXT_LIST_PRICE AS EXT_LIST_PRICE,
CPSL.SOURCE_PRODUCT_TYPE AS SOURCE_PRODUCT_TYPE,
CPSL.IS_XAAS_SKU AS IS_XAAS_SKU,
CPSL.SBP_FLAG AS SBP_FLAG,
-999 AS SBP_LINE_OBJECT_ID,
-999 AS DECIMAL_EXPANSION_VALUE,
COALESCE(ICSSV.UPDATED_ON, CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS SSVW_UPDATED_ON,
'N' AS OVERRIDE_ROYALTY_FLG,
'N' AS OVERRIDE_STANDARD_COST_FLG,
'N' AS OVERRIDE_OVERHEAD_FLG,
'N' AS OVERRIDE_LIST_PRICE_FLG,
'N' AS OVERRIDE_EXT_NET_PRICE_FLG,
'N' AS OVERRIDE_DISCOUNT_FLG,
CPSL.CONSTRUCT_TYPE AS CONSTRUCT_TYPE,
CPSL.ATTRIBUTION_METHODOLOGY AS ATTRIBUTION_METHODOLOGY,
CPSL.SINGLE_SKU_LINE_TYPE AS SINGLE_SKU_LINE_TYPE,
CPSL.ATTRIBUTION_REQUIRED AS ATTRIBUTION_REQUIRED,
CPSL.OA_PROXY_LIST_PRICE AS OA_PROXY_LIST_PRICE,
CPSL.OA_LIST_PRICE AS OA_LIST_PRICE,
CPSL.OA_NET_PRICE AS OA_NET_PRICE,
COALESCE(CPSL.WF_PRICED, 'N') AS WF_PRICED,
CPSL.PROMO_DISC AS PROMO_DISC,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
CPSL.ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO AS ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO_TXT,
-999 AS GLOB_PRC_LST_EXTND_LST_USD_PRC,
CPSL.TOTAL_PA_CREDIT AS TOTAL_PURCH_ADJ_CREDIT_USD_AMT,
CPSL.OA_SUCCESS AS OA_SUCCESS_FLG,
'N' AS UI_HIDE_FLG,
CPSL.SOA_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE AS SOA_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE_CD,
CPSL.PRICING_TERM AS PRICING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
CPSL.CHARGE_TYPE AS CHARGE_TYPE_NAME,
CPSL.INITIAL_TERM AS INITIAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
CPSL.REMAINING_TERM AS REMAINING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
CPSL.ACTION_TAG AS ACTION_TAG_NAME,
CPSL.BILLING_MODEL AS BILLING_MODEL_NAME,
CPSL.RATE_TABLE_URL AS RATE_TABLE_URL_ADDR,
CPSL.UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT AS UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT_NAME,
CPSL.AUTO_RENEWAL_TERM AS AUTO_RENEWAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
CPSL.PREPAY_TERM AS PREPAY_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
CPSL.RATE_TABLE_NAME AS RATE_TABLE_NAME,
CPSL.SBP_SUBSCRIPTION_ID AS SBP_SUBSCRIPTION_ID,
CAST(COALESCE(CPSL.SUBSCRIPTION_END_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') AS DATE FORMAT 'YY/MM/DD') AS SUBSCRIPTION_END_DT,
CAST(COALESCE(CPSL.SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') AS DATE FORMAT 'YY/MM/DD') AS SUBSCRPITION_START_DT,
CPSL.USAGE_QUANTITY AS USAGE_QUANTITY,
CPSL.SUBSCRIPTION_CREDIT AS SUBSCRIPTION_CREDIT_USD_AMT,
-999 AS COUNTRY_ENABLMENT_COST_USD_AMT,
-999 AS SERVICE_USD_COST,
CPSL.NOAH_FLAG AS NOAH_FLAG,
CPSL.XAAS_COMMITED_PARENT_ID AS XAAS_COMMITED_PARENT_ID,
CPSL.SBP_SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID AS SBP_SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID,
CPSL.EFFECTIVE_DISC_STD AS EFFECTIVE_DISC_STD,
CASE WHEN CPSL.SS_CODE = 'CCWQUOTING' THEN 'CCW' WHEN CPSL.SS_CODE ='CCWR' THEN 'CCWR' ELSE CPSL.SS_CODE END AS SS_CODE
FROM 
$$ETLVWDB.ST_SI_CQ_PUBLISHED_SCEN_LINE AS CPSL,
$$ETLVWDB.ST_SI_INT_CQ_SNGL_SCENARIO_VW AS ICSSV
WHERE	
CPSL.SCENARIO_OBJECT_ID = ICSSV.OBJECT_ID 
AND ICSSV.PUBLISHED_DATE IS NOT NULL 
AND CPSL.EDW_CREATE_DTM >= (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_ST_CQ_PUBLISHED_SCENARIO_LINE')
AND CPSL.OBJECT_ID NOT IN (5462705463,5462705462,5462484734,5462484733,5466504716,5459453246,5459453247,5459453248,5459453252,5459453249,5459453250,5459453251,5459453253,5459453254,5459453255,5459453256,5459453257,5459453258,5459453259,5459453260,5459453261,5459453262,5459453263,5459453267,5459453264,5459453265,5459453266,5459453268,5459453269,5459453270,5459453271,5459453272,5459453273,5459453274,5459453275,5459453276,5459453277,5459453278,5459453282,5459453279,5459453280,5459453281,5459453283,5459453284,5459453285,
5222937415,5222937234,5222937241,5222937242,5222937258,5222937266,5222937357,5222937286,5222937366,5222937364,5222937370,5222937378,5222937386,5222937388,5222937390,5222937394,5222937399,5222937400,5222937402,5222937403,5222937405,5222937406,5222937409,5222937410,5222937411,5222937412,5222937414)
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by CPSL.DEAL_ID, CPSL.OBJECT_ID, CPSL.SCENARIO_OBJECT_ID order by CPSL.OFFSET_NUMBER desc, CPSL.EDW_CREATE_DTM desc )=1
